message:
test(fixtures): update share help golden snapshot

- Align share subcommand list with new static-export/deploy commands
- Fix clippy lint in Search highlight unit test

files.patch:
@@ -1,13 +1,15 @@
 Usage: am share <COMMAND>
 
 Commands:
-  export   
-  update   
-  preview  
-  verify   
-  decrypt  
-  wizard   
-  help     Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)
+  export         
+  update         
+  preview        
+  verify         
+  decrypt        
+  wizard         
+  static-export  
+  deploy         
+  help           Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)
 
 Options:
   -h, --help  Print help
